message:
Add runtime platform-seam injection and browser worker offload config

Refactor RuntimeInner construction to accept explicit platform seams
(io driver, timer driver, entropy source) through the builder, and add
a browser worker offload configuration contract for CPU-heavy paths.

src/runtime/builder.rs:
- Add io_driver, timer_driver, entropy_source fields to RuntimeBuilder
- Add with_io_driver(), with_timer_driver(), with_entropy_source()
  builder methods for explicit platform injection
- Add browser_worker_offload(), browser_worker_offload_enabled(),
  browser_worker_offload_limits(), browser_worker_transfer_mode(),
  browser_worker_cancellation_mode() builder methods
- Change build() to call with_config_and_platform() passing all
  platform seam options
- Add with_config_and_platform() private constructor accepting
  optional reactor, io driver, timer driver, and entropy source
- Extract RuntimeInner::new into three focused methods:
  initialize_runtime_state (wires platform seams into RuntimeState),
  initialize_root_region (configures observability, clock, regions),
  spawn_worker_threads (thread lifecycle with cleanup on failure)
- Add runtime_builder_platform_seams_propagate_into_task_contexts test
  verifying injected io/timer/entropy flow through to Cx in spawned
  tasks
- Add runtime_builder_platform_seams_override_reactor_defaults test
  verifying explicit seams take precedence over reactor-derived
  defaults
- Add runtime_builder_browser_worker_offload_policy_round_trips test

src/runtime/config.rs:
- Add WorkerTransferMode enum (CloneStructured, TransferableOnly)
- Add WorkerCancellationMode enum (BestEffortAbort, RequireAck)
- Add BrowserWorkerOffloadConfig struct with enabled, min_task_cost,
  max_in_flight, transfer_mode, cancellation_mode,
  require_owned_payloads fields and normalize() method
- Wire BrowserWorkerOffloadConfig into RuntimeConfig with Default
  (disabled, cost 1024, in-flight 16, TransferableOnly, RequireAck)
- Add test_browser_worker_offload_defaults and
  test_browser_worker_offload_normalize_clamps_zero_values tests
- Update all existing config test cases with the new field

src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs:
- Remove duplicate ScopedLocalScheduler struct and CURRENT_LOCAL
  thread-local (moved or deduplicated elsewhere)
- Apply clippy if-let-else simplification in browser handoff test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
